_README: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the project's fixed names and paths. Edit the values here and they flow everywhere: the C# service embeds this file at build time (see OrchestratorDefaults.cs) and the PowerShell scripts read it at runtime. Keep it valid JSON — no // comments, escape backslashes as \\. The one value that can't be auto-derived from here is the exe's assembly name in Orchestrator.Service.csproj (<AssemblyName>), which must match 'exeName' below.
serviceDescription: Syncs and manages programs from a GitHub manifest.
